items.question: What is Wink Brief?
items.answer: Wink Brief is the newsletter route for practical reads about direct hotel distribution and travel commerce.

items.question: Who should subscribe?
items.answer: Hotel teams, Partners, agencies, developers, and platform teams can subscribe if they follow direct demand and social commerce.

items.question: Can I unsubscribe?
items.answer: Yes. The public newsletter setup should include an unsubscribe path when the email system is connected.

fields.heading: Ready to make hotel demand bookable?
fields.body: Start with the route that matches your team, then move into a focused demo or sign-up flow.
